from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuYm9vayBpbXBvcnQgQm9vawoKYm9vayA9IEJvb2soIlB5dGhvbiBCYXNpY3MiLCAiQW5hIikKcHJpbnQoYm9vay5zdW1tYXJ5KCkpCg==',
    'models/library_item.py': 'Y2xhc3MgTGlicmFyeUl0ZW06CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgdGl0bGUpOgogICAgICAgIHNlbGYudGl0bGUgPSB0aXRsZQoKICAgIGRlZiBzdW1tYXJ5KHNlbGYpOgogICAgICAgIHJldHVybiBzZWxmLnRpdGxlCg==',
    'models/book.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMubGlicmFyeV9pdGVtIGltcG9ydCBMaWJyYXJ5SXRlbQoKY2xhc3MgQm9vayhMaWJyYXJ5SXRlbSk6CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgdGl0bGUsIGF1dGhvcik6CiAgICAgICAgc3VwZXIoKS5fX2luaXRfXyh0aXRsZSkKICAgICAgICBzZWxmLmF1dGhvciA9IGF1dGhvcgo=',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
